name: aibridge
description: Intelligent model routing for dev workflows: dispatch tasks/reviews/digests across GPT (codex), Gemini (agy), and Claude subagents by the model-selection methodology. Bundles the aibridge MCP server (async ai_review_start/ai_exec_start jobs + ai_digest) and seven routing skills. (No hyphen in the name: a hyphen breaks the slash-menu fuzzy match.)
